scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/web3-payment && npm run build -w packages/payments && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.build:native: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/web3-payment && npm run build -w packages/capacitor-iap && npm run build -w packages/payments && npm run build -w packages/capacitor-native && npm run build:native -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w packages/web3-payment && npm run test -w apps/api && npm run test -w apps/web
scripts.lint: eslint apps/api/src apps/web/src packages/shared/src packages/web3-payment/src packages/payments/src
scripts.lint:fix: eslint --fix apps/api/src apps/web/src packages/shared/src packages/web3-payment/src packages/payments/src
